slides.title: Two free longevity vitals are *on your wrist*.
slides.sub: Resting heart rate and heart-rate variability are simple daily signals of how you are aging.

slides.title: Two simple daily signals
slides.body: Resting heart rate and heart-rate variability, RHR and HRV, are easy at-home numbers *worth watching*.

slides.title: Lower resting rate, fitter heart
slides.body: A lower resting heart rate generally reflects a *more efficient, fitter heart* doing the same work with less effort.

slides.title: Higher HRV, better recovery
slides.body: More variability between beats reflects good recovery and *a resilient nervous system* that adapts well to stress.

slides.title: What moves the numbers
slides.body: Cardio fitness, sleep and stress all shift them. Better habits *can nudge both* in the right direction.

slides.title: Read the trend, not one day
slides.body: Any single reading is noisy. Watch the trend over weeks, because *direction matters more* than one number.

slides.title: Watch the *trend that matters*.
slides.body: Vibe Health pulls your daily signals into one calm Health Score so you can follow the trend, not chase one reading.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Two of the simplest longevity vitals are already on your wrist: resting heart rate and heart-rate variability. ⌚

A lower resting rate reflects a fitter heart, higher variability reflects good recovery, and sleep, stress and cardio move them both. Watch the trend over weeks. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily signals into one calm score → link in bio.
